---
title: "Mahamadi NIKIEMA"
image: "id-image.png"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 160px
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/MNIKIEMA
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mahamadi-nikiema/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/MahamadiN
    - icon: ""
      text: "🤗 Hugging Face"
      href: https://huggingface.co/madoss
---

## About me

I'm an ML Engineer passionate about building intelligent systems that work in practice — not just in notebooks.

I work at the intersection of machine learning, LLMs, and data engineering. My focus is on understanding how models actually behave: how they're trained, fine-tuned, and deployed.

## This blog

This is where I document things I learn. Posts range from deep dives into model internals (like normalization in transformers) to practical engineering (like hybrid search with pgvector).

The **TILs** section captures smaller, sharper insights — the kind of things worth writing down so I don't forget them.

## Interests

- Large language models & fine-tuning
- Vector search & retrieval systems
- Data pipelines & engineering
